code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
let n = tokens.len()

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let tok = match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  nums = list.push(nums, v)
  i = i + 1
end

mut result: List<Int> = []
mut cur = 0
mut j = 0
while j < n
  let x = match nums.get(j)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if j == 0
    cur = x
  else if x > cur
    cur = x
  end
  result = list.push(result, cur)
  j = j + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut k = 0
while k < n
  let v = match result.get(k)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if k == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  k = k + 1
end

println(out)
